meta.title: Terms – Einier Freyre
meta.description: Terms and conditions for Cloud, DevOps and Platform Engineering consulting services.

content.title: Terms and Conditions
content.s1b: I offer consulting services in Cloud Infrastructure, DevOps and Platform Engineering. The scope, deliverables and timeline for each project are defined in a proposal signed by both parties.
content.s2b: All code, configurations and documentation developed during a project are delivered to the client. There is no lock-in or contractual dependency after project completion.
content.s3b: All information shared during the contractual relationship is treated as confidential and not disclosed to third parties.
content.s4b: Services are provided "as is". I am not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of the implementations.
content.s5b: For any questions about these terms, write to freyre.dev@gmail.com.
